changes: Added a generated root robots.txt for the deployed web app that disallows Netlify function routes, admin-ish paths, and common WordPress probe URLs from polite crawler indexing
Removed the old request-access prompt from the signed-out login helper copy and trimmed the message down to a simpler 'Please login to continue' on desktop and mobile
Fixed Recently Added activation counts so they reflect the full 'View all added shirts' dataset instead of only the 5-item preview summary
Corrected Recently Added rotation status to use lifetime wear history for each added item, avoiding false unworn counts from the app-era analytics cutoff and missing source-row linkage
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.1.8 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata
Fixed the Insights "View all for-sale items" action so it opens the full exact-tagged list without throwing a scope error
Expanded the Sold flow with a Trade checkbox plus a conditional "Traded for" field, allowing non-cash swaps to be recorded without fake sale prices while preserving optional cash add-ons
Updated sold-history surfaces so trades display correctly in the recycle bin, event log, and sold archive insights instead of being forced into cash-only wording
Added a View all sold items action in the sold archive so the 5-item preview can open the full sold-history list in a dedicated dialog
Widened the full sold-history dialog by roughly 50% so trade, buyer, marketplace, and cash-add-on details fit more comfortably
Fixed no-buy streak stats so adding inventory rows no longer counts as an automatic purchase and only explicit no-buy buy events break the streak
Kept add-date history for inventory analytics while moving purchase/no-buy streak calculations onto the manual no-buy purchase log, so trades and gifts can be added without punishing the streak
Replaced the open-ended No-Buy XP formula with a real 10-level progression ladder so leveling has a clear cap and gets harder as you climb
Added next-level progress messaging in the No-Buy game so the XP card now shows how much XP remains until the next level, or when max level is reached
Made the No-Buy next-level XP line clickable so it opens a compact levels dialog with the full 10-level XP ladder
Added progress bars to the No-Buy XP card and levels dialog so current progress toward the next level is visible at a glance
Fixed Boss trigger counts to use real temptation hits from the No-Buy action log instead of collapsing multiple same-day temptations into a single daily check-in count
Added a `Low mood` button to the Pre-Buy Check "What's pulling you in?" grid so the quick-trigger buttons match the shared No-Buy reason set more closely
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.1.7 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata
Aligned the No-Buy temptation and buying-reason dropdowns around one shared reason list so both controls expose the same core options instead of drifting apart
Cleaned up the shared No-Buy reason labels and ordering by renaming Promo/Sale to Promo, removing Marketed from the UI, and regrouping the reasons into a more logical flow
Toned down utility actions across the main toolbar and table controls by switching Add Column, Edit Columns, Go to Top / Bottom, and Add Row to a lighter compact secondary treatment
Matched the mobile-only bottom table action rows to the top-of-table button formatting so Go to Top, Add Row, and the lower utility pills use the same compact centered treatment on mobile
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.1.6 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata

Refined the photo preview dialog with a smaller red Clear action, readable white destructive text, outside-click close behavior, and large auto-fit image sizing that avoids accidental destructive taps
Removed the abandoned photo-preview zoom experiment and tightened preview sizing so the image opens large enough to inspect cleanly without extra zoom controls
Added a once-per-day No-Buy XP reward when a logged temptation turns into a cooldown or anti-buy move, while keeping buy logging non-punitive to lifetime XP
Polished the No-Buy recent button log with aligned three-column rows and cleaner centered detail spacing for action history readability
Redefined No-Buy recovery eligibility so one unique shirt counts per progress point when it is never worn, at 0-1 lifetime wears, or idle for 30+ days

Fixed No-Buy recovery mission progress to evaluate shirts from their pre-wear state and track already-counted shirt IDs, resolving the issue where recovery could get stuck and the last wear would not count
Fixed stale No-Buy recovery state so expired recovery missions stop blocking new progress, and eligible recovery wears are judged against the selected worn date instead of the current clock

Removed duplicate table edit-update paths so standard cell edits no longer trigger overlapping state writes, while preserving edit logging, name sorting, type-icon refreshes, and Add new... select behavior
Trimmed a small safe cleanup pass by removing unreachable share-summary layout code, caching type-icon map reads, and deleting an unreferenced build helper script
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.1.5 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata
Added a row-level Sold action under The Yarn so inventory items can capture sale price, buyer, and marketplace before moving into the recycle bin
Added durable sold-history tracking that survives recycle-bin retention and restore flows, so completed resale records stay available for long-term analytics
Expanded Insights with a Sold archive covering total sold items, resale revenue, sold-over-time history, recent sold items, top buyers, and top marketplaces
Improved initial load responsiveness by revealing the app shell during the first auth check and deferring photo-source prefetch work until idle time
Corrected the Wear Calendar Heatmap to use Sunday-first weeks so the monthly grids match standard calendar layout
Fixed initial preview image hydration so row photo thumbnails retry after auth/prefetch settles instead of requiring a tab switch to appear
Fixed no-buy recovery mission deadlines to run through the full final calendar day, so eligible wears on the deadline date still count instead of expiring at the original buy timestamp
Fixed Wear Next Queue ranking so historically worn items, including EUC pieces outside the 2026-03-01 analytics window, no longer get treated as true first-wear candidates
Added a dedicated Insights For Sale section driven only by the exact For Sale tag, including current item count, tagged value, a 5-item preview, and a full-list dialog
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.1.4 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata
Added a dedicated Pre-Buy Check front door to No-Buy with trigger-first coaching, 72-hour hold flow, wishlist parking, and a softer action layout across desktop and mobile

Added a synced desktop/Tauri Daily No-Buy Mission card that assigns one anti-buy task per day, keeps it stable for that day across devices, and surfaces it above the brand tabs without affecting mobile
Expanded Pre-Buy Check with live fuzzy duplicate friction against inventory using name/brand/type, so likely closet overlaps surface before a buy or wishlist park
Upgraded Pre-Buy wishlist parking to carry over typed brand/type details, add a Held tag, and save clearer hold notes for later review

Expanded No-Buy recovery guidance with recovery-window summaries, low-wear added-shirt shortcuts, and help-copy refreshes that explain both the newer pre-buy layer and the older streak/cooldown/trend rules more clearly
Aligned Worn today and row-level Log Wear so both feed the same recovery-progress logic, while keeping recovery eligibility limited to shirts with tracked in-app add dates (`createdAt`)

Expanded Wear Next Queue with exact type filtering, an 'Another 10' reshuffle, clearer Not today vs Snooze 30d behavior, richer queue help text, and placement directly under Wrapped for faster recommendation browsing

Updated collector-facing stats wording and correctness with a 2-wear keeper threshold, whole-word common-name matching, plain-English help copy refreshes, and in-dialog drilldown jump links across Main Stats, Insights, and Advanced Stats

Merged reactivation/value-recovery coaching into a single 7-day recovery plan, refined recovery wording to avoid repetitive CPW phrasing, and made Top 5 to sell immediately backfill after 30-day dismissals

Expanded Advanced Stats Type Rules with import/export/reset helpers, built-in vs custom rule transparency, live excluded-type summaries, and full type-rotation balance rows that include zero-wear included types
Added a new Tag Maintenance workspace in Advanced Stats for closet-wide tag rename/merge/delete actions, conservative duplicate review, batch untagged cleanup, and related dialog polish

Centralized collector-stats type rules across Main Stats, Insights, Advanced Stats, and related analytics, with a local Advanced Stats Type Rules editor for adding exact or contains-based denylist exclusions without code

Expanded Advanced Stats tag analytics with Collector DNA, tag financial footprint, co-occurrence, 30-day trend tracking, rarity picks, monthly seasonality, and tag-dominance eras for richer collector-facing tag insights

Polished Advanced Stats tag browsing with collapsible per-tag sections, playful Collector DNA archetype framing, an untagged-items finder, coverage logic that treats Original as present without polluting analytics, per-tag item-list dialogs, and cleaner rarity-row wrapping/alignment

Expanded Wear Next Queue day/theme logic with Mickey Monday, Tag Pop Tuesday, Whale Wednesday, Floral Friday, May floral behavior, National Flannel Day, Cinco de Mayo, and broader USA holiday timing while balancing cold-month flannels/hoodies and warm-month long-sleeve pressure
Added collector-facing Help dialogs for Main Stats, Insights, Advanced Stats, and No-Buy Game, plus wider/tuned desktop analytics dialogs for denser explanations and easier scanning
Added Select All / Unselect All on the main grid, Wrapped history browsing for real data-backed month/year periods, and an in-app No-Buy full-history dialog instead of a browser popup

Reworked Insights selling and marketplace behavior with a Top 5 to sell shortlist, Feb 1 2026 / 90-day protection logic, per-item 30-day dismissals, preserved dialog scroll during actions, holiday occasion-lane coverage, hidden-Fandom-safe Top Fandoms, and live normalization of XXChange to Dixxon XXChange
Added a stats-only pre-app wear cutoff starting 2026-03-01 so Jan/Feb 2026 wear history no longer skews collector analytics, while preserving the real shirt rows, add dates, and purchase timing
Applied the cutoff to wear-log-driven analytics across Insights, Main Stats, Advanced Stats, and wishlist first-wear / repeat-wear stats so app-era behavior reads more honestly
Kept inventory data, createdAt values, purchase streaks, no-buy data, and underlying row state untouched so the app does not invent fake March 1 purchases or overwrite legacy collection history

Recalibrated Insights, Main Stats, and Advanced Stats around collector-normal behavior so low-frequency closets are judged by yearly reach, protected-piece intent, and adoption reality instead of fast-rotation assumptions

Added richer collector coaching across stats windows, including queue lanes with explanations, heatmap day/month drilldowns, confidence reasons, review-first sell suggestions, and stronger marketplace/parked-value summaries

Expanded No-Buy Game coaching with Risk right now, Best move today, pressure mix, clean badges, boss-trigger summaries, trend direction labels, cooldown action logging, and more urgent recovery guidance
Upgraded Main Stats with a collector snapshot, today’s-story summary, richer whale context, recent-add activation status, and lighter collapsible treatment for lower-priority sections
Upgraded Advanced Stats with stronger strongest/weakest callouts, grace-window-adjusted backlog reads, monthly verdicts, seasonal quiet-window detection, and sleeper-vs-overloaded tag reads
Added extra summary cards in Insights, Advanced Stats, and No-Buy so marketplace, activation, and trigger grids feel fuller and more informative
Added Work Appropriate and Formal lane coverage summaries in Insights and Advanced Stats so special-purpose tagged shirts show up as their own collector lanes
Updated queue telemetry so row-level Log Wear actions count toward queue acceptance stats after the undo window, even when the wear is backdated
Extended holiday-tag matching to Easter, Mardi Gras, and Dia de los Muertos so holiday recommendations and out-of-season handling include the new tags
Treat Borlandflex as flannel-like in seasonal recommendation logic so RSVLTS flannels receive the same boosts, penalties, and seasonal-window labeling
Fixed the shared flannel-like helper scope so the new Borlandflex holiday/seasonal logic does not throw when opening Insights
Refreshed stats-related dialogs with a softer multi-color visual system across cards, sections, bars, links, and headings so analytics feel richer without becoming harsh
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.1.0 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata
Added a duplicate-risk review step to wishlist 'Got It!' transfers so likely closet overlaps are surfaced before an item moves into inventory
Upgraded duplicate checking to use image-aware preview similarity first (with metadata as fallback) so same-brand/same-fandom false positives are reduced
Added a Wishlist Conversion Funnel in wishlist stats with tracked conversion counts, first-wear/repeat-wear rates, timing medians, top converting brands/types, and a details dialog
Connected buy-gate verdicts to the wishlist funnel so flagged vs clear purchases can be compared over time by first-wear and repeat-wear outcomes
Added per-row Delete controls to No-Buy Game Recent button log so duplicate or mistaken temptation/buy entries can be removed
Wired deletion to underlying no-buy sources (buy log and temptation check-ins) so Trends and summaries stay consistent after removals
Improved no-buy cross-device continuity by preserving fallback timestamp behavior for older payloads while syncing/deleting log actions
Fixed no-buy cross-device conflict cases by introducing freshness-aware merge metadata (`revision` + `updatedAt`) so latest state wins and deleted entries do not reappear
Updated no-buy purchase counting and trend aggregation to use event-level behavior, including same-day multi-buy support and action-log-first purchase trend/source logic
Corrected Last buy reason to derive from the latest timestamped purchase action (with legacy fallback only when needed)
Added near real-time Insights dialog refresh while open (with preserved sim-date and scroll position) so stat changes appear immediately after edits/actions
Shipped routine release maintenance: version references updated to 2.0.20 across web, shared, and Tauri metadata
Added a dedicated No-Buy Game dialog launched from the Stats footer, separating no-buy gameplay from Insights
Implemented no-buy XP progression, levels, streak milestones, buy credits, cooldown controls, temptation check-ins, and recovery mission tracking in the standalone game window
Switched no-buy purchase logging to manual-only so adding gifted/traded shirts does not auto-log a buy event
Added buying-reason capture for manual buy logs and expanded reason options (Good deal, Rare find, Boredom, Got paid/Extra money, Marketed, Promo/Sale, Other)
Added Trends and Recent button log sections in No-Buy Game, including the last 10 actions with timestamp + reason and color-coded entries (temptation green, buy red)
Mapped internal reason keys to human-readable labels across trends, recent logs, and last-buy summary
Updated no-buy reason dropdowns to start blank with explicit 'Select reason' placeholders instead of preselected defaults
Added cloud sync support for No-Buy Game state (XP, logs, reasons, cooldown, recovery) so desktop web and Tauri desktop stay in sync
Added no-buy fallback timestamp reconstruction for older synced payloads so recent logs still show readable date/time history in Tauri
Added no-buy resilience safeguards: rolling state snapshots, merged snapshot history across sync, and exportable No-Buy log JSON backups
Fixed cross-device no-buy sync conflicts by adding freshness metadata (revision/updatedAt) and authoritative newest-state merge behavior so deleted log lines do not reappear
Refined No-Buy Game controls layout and spacing: one-row action buttons, centered reason selectors, and smaller button sizing for cleaner density
Removed the Stats button from mobile-only header actions while keeping desktop web and Tauri desktop stats functionality intact
Recalibrated Insights behavior scoring for large low-frequency closets (collector-normal tuning) so health/risk signals better reflect 180+ item wardrobes with 1-2 wears per item/year
Added Annual Coverage Index and Collector-normal Rotation Model tiers (A/B/C windows) with expected monthly touch pacing
Added Opportunity-adjusted Backlog metric that excludes grace-window additions, protected items, and seasonal exemptions
Expanded seasonal fairness in coaching logic by excluding out-of-window holiday items and summer-offseason flannel cases from reactivation/sell pressure
Relaxed several Insights and Closet Audit thresholds/tones to avoid over-penalizing low-frequency rotation patterns
Added a 30-day grace rule to Suggested sell shortlist so newly added shirts are not recommended for selling
Added optional 'Play story' mode to Personal Style DNA (Wrapped) with monthly/yearly narrated carousel slides, keyboard navigation, and reduced-motion support
Expanded Wrapped storytelling content with deeper explanations, recommendations, a dedicated Top Tags slide, and clearer Peak Day wording (explicit wear-count meaning)
Added a new Behavior & Coaching Insights suite with volatility, weekday/weekend persona split, exploration ratio, comeback candidates, queue readiness, wildcard pick, and bench pressure
Implemented Phase 2 coaching analytics: acquisition quality scoring, theme fatigue detection, decision-friction tracking, and upgraded bench-pressure scoring with daily queue telemetry
Implemented Phase 3 predictive analytics: value-recovery forecasting, outfit-confidence curve, adaptive queue profile, and a generated 7-day reactivation playbook
Added selling intelligence with a suggested sell shortlist and BST/eBay/Mercari marketplace diagnostics (inventory count, inactivity, never-worn load, tagged value, and average CPW)
Expanded marketplace diagnostics to also track XXChange tags in summary and detailed Insights rollups
Excluded Whale-tagged items from sell and reactivation recommendations to respect collectible intent
Improved Insights copy clarity with section-level explanatory hints and expanded action-oriented guidance in the Closet Audit 'Recommended next actions' block
Refined Insights queue simulator layout: centered and compact date selector, content-width 'Use today' button, centered ranking preview date, and cleaner control hierarchy
Added semantic value coloring for key Insights and Closet Audit metrics (green for healthy signals, red for risk signals)
Improved stats dialog readability with subtle color hierarchy for section titles, labels, values, hints, and charts
Added thin bordered action-footer containers across stats-related dialogs to separate control buttons from data content
Widened stats-related dialogs by roughly 15% to improve readability for dense analytics layouts
Centered the Wear Tracking 'Worn on date' block, including date picker, logged shirts/results, and wear-history/unworn links
Added Wear Next queue explainability drawer with per-item score breakdown (boosts, penalties, and total)
Added one-click 'Worn today' action in Wear Next queue to log wear directly from Insights
Updated Wear Next queue action label from 'Snooze 3 days' to 'Snooze' while keeping the 3-day snooze behavior
Added Theme/Day simulation mode in Insights with a date picker and 'Use today' reset to preview queue ranking changes by date
Expanded holiday weighting with date-aware tag matching for USA/July 4, St. Patrick's Day, Valentine's Day, Thanksgiving, Hanukkah, Christmas, and Halloween
Added out-of-season holiday penalties and stricter generic holiday cross-referencing to prevent mismatched seasonal recommendations
Fixed holiday priority behavior so active holiday windows no longer show 'Holiday deprioritized' on matching dates
Adjusted queue seasonality to strongly suppress flannels during summer (especially July/August peak heat)
Added warm-weather summer boosts (Jun-Aug) for Kunuflex, Bamboo, Polo, Four-way Stretch Blend, Spoonerkloth, Candy Floss, and Bottleblend with case/punctuation-insensitive matching
Added new Insights entry point in the Stats dialog footer on desktop and mobile
Added Insights dialog with Closet Audit Scorecard, Wear Next Queue, and Wear Calendar Heatmap sections
Added Wear Next Queue snooze controls (3-day hide) with local persistence
Added Wear Calendar Heatmap filters for year and brand with month-by-month daily intensity tiles
Added action-oriented Closet Audit recommendations tied to health score, inactive capital, and backlog metrics
Expanded Closet Audit scorecard from 4 to 6 cards by adding 30-day rotation coverage and no-buy streak metrics
Fixed Backlog Risk to use the full never-worn-since-added total instead of the 12-item preview cap
Added Personal Style DNA (Wrapped) in Insights with monthly and yearly highlight cards (top brand/type, peak day, streak, adds/spend, top fandom/tag)
Replaced DNA 'Top shirt' with a Spotlight Wear metric that ranks the most meaningful single wear event by impact signals
Updated Wear Next scoring to prioritize never-worn items more strongly, including extra boosts for NWT/NWOT
Reduced value-driven queue pressure for Whale and Holiday tagged items while preserving core time/never-worn/value weighting
Added seasonal and date-aware queue boosts: flannel in cold months, Floral on Fridays, Holiday items near major holidays, Star Wars on May 4, Mickey on Mondays, and Whale on Wednesdays
Added desktop drag-and-drop tab reordering and persisted manual tab order across sessions/devices
Removed Cloudflare analytics integration and switched web app analytics script to Simple Analytics
Updated Netlify CSP to allow Simple Analytics script/queue endpoints and removed Cloudflare analytics allowances
Added 'Worn on date' selector in Wear Tracking stats to show all shirts worn on any selected date
Added full Wear History dialog link from stats with shirt name, brand, type, and wear date
Replaced 'Bottom 5 least worn' with a dialog link listing shirts not worn in the past 6 months
Added Type to 'Shirts worn on date' results and grouped matches by name + brand + type
Added 'View all added shirts' dialog from Recently Added with name, brand, type, date added, and price
Added 'Advanced Stats' link and dialog with wear risk, adoption, utilization, streak, seasonality, and tag-performance analytics
Excluded non-wear types (Chinos, Boxer Briefs, Socks, Hat, Shorts, Hybrid Shorts, Joggers, Misc, Outerwear, Bamboo Shorts) from wear-based stats while keeping them in inventory/value stats
Updated Wear Gap Risk so Advanced Stats stays compact and links to a dedicated full-list dialog
Hardened cloud sync durability: auto-retry failed sync writes, flush pending edits on hide/page-exit, and flush before sign-out to reduce cross-device reverts
Added 'Advanced Diagnostics' link in Cloud Backup with a detailed sync-status dialog (timers, retry count, sync lag, last edit/push times, and latest sync error)
Added Stats export menu in the Stats dialog with CSV (tabular) and JSON (complete payload) downloads
Added printable PDF exports for Stats: a concise summary report and a full all-stats report with expanded table sections
Removed popup dependency from Stats PDF export flow so print-to-PDF works in preview environments that block window.open
Expanded pricing rankings to top 10 most expensive and top 10 cheapest, and excluded Socks/Boxer Briefs/Hat/Misc from the cheapest list
Standardized stats item labels to 'Shirt Name (Brand) - Type' across pricing, wear, whales, and recent added/deleted lists
Replaced 'Top 5 most worn' with 'Top rotation score' using wear count, recency, and price weighting with tie indicators and an on-screen score formula legend
Replaced Advanced Stats 'Wear Gap Risk' with first-wear lag analytics (preview + full list) to highlight slow adoption after add date
Set first-wear lag outlier preview to top 10 and updated Stats exports (CSV/PDF) to use first-wear lag labels
Added helper text under Closet health score explaining what the 0-100 score represents
Moved main Stats 'Advanced Stats' trigger into the dialog footer as a button next to Export and Close
Removed one-of-a-kind Rarities rows from main Stats while keeping the Whales section
Got It! log now syncs to Supabase (survives browser clears and device switches)
Clear All undo now preserves full row data (wearCount, wearLog, tags, createdAt)
'Last 5 Worn' now shows 5 most recently worn items (not just last 5 days)
Wear log is now lifetime (365-day cap removed)
Wishlist 'Recently Added' now shows Brand column instead of tab name
Added Cloudflare Web Analytics as sole analytics provider (Plausible removed)
Added 800ms page reveal fallback for slow connections (Lighthouse fix)
Added password manager support via autocomplete attributes on auth form
Fixed dropdown values (Condition, Size, etc.) reverting after cloud sync
Fixed Stats button and mode toggle disappearing after idle timeout or cached reload
Fixed Sign Out button disappearing after cloud sync on desktop
Fixed transparent image backgrounds rendering black in compressed uploads
Updated flannel icon with new plaid shirt design
Added 'Top brand by month' bar chart to stats dialog
Removed Storage section from stats dialog
Added brand name (tab) in parentheses next to all wear tracking stat items
Added brand name (tab) in parentheses next to most/least expensive items
Added wearLog array for per-wear date tracking with undo support
Added 'Top brand by day of week' bar chart in Wear Tracking stats
Added 'Whales' section under Rarities listing all items tagged as Whale
Fixed Tauri 'Delete Forever' button in recycle bin (replaced native confirm with inline confirmation)
Applied same inline confirm fix to 'Empty All' recycle bin button
Version bump script expanded to 10 locations across 8 files
Added 'Last 5 Worn' stat (items worn within last 5 days)
Added purchase streaks (current and longest consecutive days with adds)
Added no-buy streaks (current and longest days without purchase)
Logo click now refreshes page on desktop (web + Tauri)
Got It! log capped at 500 entries with trimmed count for lifetime accuracy
Recently Added and Recently Deleted now show Type in parentheses
Stats dialog widened to 620px with improved text wrapping
Added wear tracking with Total Wears count, Last Worn date, and Log Wear button
Added date picker for wear logging (defaults to today, max capped at today)
Added 5-second undo for wear logging
Added wear statistics: Longest Unworn, Cost Per Wear, Top/Bottom 5 Most/Least Worn
Added Got It! timestamp and transfer logging for wishlist items moved to inventory
Added Top Tags 'Original' filter and wishlist stats overhaul (Items Obtained, Most Recent Got It)
Hidden columns now excluded from per-tab stats
Fixed button hover states on 8 button types (migrated inline JS styles to CSS classes)
Fixed Tauri admin panel CORS for desktop app (dynamic origin allowlist)
Centered mobile card Actions label and Wear Tracking section
Lighthouse Performance score improved from 48 to 93
Converted fonts to WOFF2 and removed 5 unused font files (~950KB savings)
Converted logo to WebP with PNG fallback via <picture> element (84% smaller)
Created properly-sized 600px mobile logo (24KB WebP vs 317KB PNG)
Removed Google Analytics in favor of Plausible (~148KB savings)
Switched to mobile-first redirect routing to eliminate double-redirect penalty
Added image and font preloading for faster LCP
Eliminated all Cumulative Layout Shift with font-display: optional and aspect-ratio
Removed unused Supabase preconnect and tightened Content Security Policy
SEO score improved from 91 to 100 with legible font sizes and meta tags
Fixed logo flash on page refresh caused by alt text rendering in Disney font
Optimized header logo from 2.6MB to 317KB (88% reduction)
Removed unused WaltographUI and Mickey font files
Added row count badges to tab buttons
Desktop tabs now wrap to multiple rows (max 5 per row)
Added Collection Stats dialog with cross-tab aggregation
Stats include: item counts, pricing (total/mean/median/top 5 expensive/cheapest), names, condition breakdown, top types/fandoms/sizes, top tags, and last deleted item
Tightened CORS on all Netlify functions to allow only shirt-tracker.com
Replaced hardcoded admin email with environment variable in notify-admin
Added in-memory signed URL cache to avoid repeated localStorage parsing
Removed duplicate CSS rules across desktop and mobile stylesheets
Added esbuild minification to the production build pipeline
Synced package.json version with app version across all files
Changelog dialog now shows only the latest version with a toggle for older ones
Fixed minified JS breaking when inlined into HTML due to $ pattern expansion
Added Recycle Bin — deleted items are now recoverable for 30 days
Recycle Bin supports both Inventory and Wishlist modes
Restore deleted items to their original tab with all data intact
Deleted items sync to the cloud automatically
Fixed signed URL cache serving expired image URLs for up to 11 hours
Fixed admin panel link not appearing on first page load
Fixed cloud sync silently discarding Supabase errors — now surfaces actionable warnings
Debounced filter input to prevent lag on every keystroke
Visual polish: hover states, transitions, focus rings, and improved table spacing
Fixed share page leaking owner-only buttons (Sign In, Tag Items, Delete, Sync)
Preview images now load instantly on repeat visits via warm cache and extended TTL
Added automatic retry for expired signed image URLs
Custom tags now persist permanently and won't disappear when switching tabs
Tag suggestions are now sorted alphabetically
Removed the 12-tag limit on suggestion chips — all tags are always visible
Added Manage Tags button to rename or delete tags across all rows
Custom tags sync to the cloud across devices
Performed a security audit and applied hardening improvements across the app
Renamed default column from Shirt Name to Name
Added NA option to Size dropdown
Added CSV import dialog with column selection and import mode picker
Added CSV overwrite and fill-empty modes that match rows by name
Added automatic CSV delimiter detection (comma, tab, semicolon)
Fixed CSV import not populating cells on overwrite and fill-empty
Renamed Last Shirt Update to Last Inventory Update
Added in-app Changelog dialog
Changelog auto-updates from CHANGELOG.json during builds
Added Wishlist mode with separate storage and segmented switcher
Added For Sale toggle with badge and filter option
Added column sorting (click any header to sort)
Added price stats row in footer
Added drag-and-drop column reordering
Added visual icon picker grid for shirt types
Moved mode switcher to sheet header
Fixed cloud sync losing Brand dropdown options
Fixed account data bleeding across users
Fixed token refresh flicker on shared views
Added hidden column preferences restored from cloud sync
Added logo image in header
Added GPL-3.0 license
Added GitHub repo link in footer
Polished inputs and UI across desktop and mobile
Split source HTML into separate CSS and JS files
Added CSV export and import
Added tag management system
Added column hide/show and sharing options
Added event log for tracking actions
Initial public release
Supabase auth with cloud sync and photo storage
Multi-tab inventory with custom columns
Desktop and mobile web apps
Tauri v2 desktop app
Share collections via public links
